brand.name: La Taste x 3 Yue
brand.title: Buffet Event Menu | 自助餐活动菜单
brand.tagline: Premium buffet experiences for birthdays, baby full moon celebrations, corporate events, weddings and private gatherings.
brand.taglineZh: 适合生日派对、宝宝满月、公司活动、婚礼及私人聚会的高级自助餐配套。

contact.addressMain: No. 14, Kompleks Perniagaan Gurun Jaya, Taman Gurun Jaya, 08300 Gurun, Kedah.
contact.addressSecond: No. 218 & 219, Jalan Mawar 3/2, Taman Pekan Baru, 08000 Sg. Petani, Kedah.

highlights.title: Premium Buffet Styling
highlights.text: Beautifully styled setup that elevates every event.
highlights.textZh: 精致布置，让活动更有仪式感。

highlights.title: Freshly Prepared Cuisine
highlights.text: Quality ingredients, prepared with care for your guests.
highlights.textZh: 用心准备食材与餐点，适合招待宾客。

highlights.title: Professional Event Team
highlights.text: Experienced service support for smooth celebrations.
highlights.textZh: 有经验的团队协助，让活动流程更顺。

highlights.title: Customisable Menu
highlights.text: Tailored to your needs, theme and preferences.
highlights.textZh: 可根据人数、主题与口味偏好调整。

terms: This buffet menu is valid for dine-in only with minimum order for event's space: Package A RM1,388, Package B RM1,988, Premium C RM1,699, Premium D RM2,288. | 此自助餐菜单适用于 event space，最低消费为：A 配套 RM1,388、B 配套 RM1,988、高级 C RM1,699、高级 D RM2,288。
Additional guests will be charged at the same package per-pax rate. | 额外人数将按照同一配套的人头价收费。
Maximum serving duration is 3 hours. | 最长供餐时间为 3 小时。
Reservation is suggested 5 days before the event with 30% deposit. | 建议活动前 5 天预订，并支付 30% 订金。
All prices exclude 10% service charge. | 所有价格不含 10% 服务费。
Pictures are for illustration purposes only. Ingredients may vary based on seasonal availability. | 图片仅供参考，食材会根据季节供应而调整。
